name: ExtensionIngredient_Manufacturer
title: R5: An organization that manufactures this ingredient (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Ingredient.manufacturer` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Ingredient.manufacturer` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Ingredient.manufacturer` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Ingredient.manufacturer` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Ingredient` is not mapped.
Element `Ingredient.manufacturer` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.definition: The way in which this manufacturer is associated with the ingredient. For example whether it is a possible one (others allowed), or an exclusive authorized one for this ingredient. Note that this is not the manufacturing process role.

binding.description: The way in which this manufacturer is associated with the ingredient.
